title: IndRevJEI
description: An addon to Industrial Revolution that adds JEI support.
body:
IndRevJEI is an addon to Industrial Revolution that adds support for viewing recipes in Just Enough Items.

Additionally, this mod also fixes issues with Industrial Revolution's item list.

For direct EMI support, you can alternatively consider EMI Extra Mod Integrations or Industrial Revolution EMI Plugin.

This mod supports being loaded with Sinytra Connector, requiring Connector Extras.
